extract: Volt Switch (Japanese: ボルトチェンジ Volt Change) is a damage-dealing Electric-type move introduced in Generation V. It is: TM72 from Generation V to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TM80 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM43 in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM048 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM066 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
